text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, looks like the sink has some limescale
building up.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'll do some light cleaning. I've still got
time until training starts. ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Expressing your daily appreciation and love for
the things around you while cleaning can greatly
boost your luck. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
La laa laa! ♪ Thanks for your hard work, sink! You
too, drainpipe! Nice and cleeean! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey hasn't turned up for training yet.
When I go to look for her...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I'm sorry! I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I got so caught up in cleaning, I completely lost track of time! I'm really sorry. I'll make sure to give it double my all tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She seems to be really sorry for missing training, and she was using the time to clean, so I decide to let her off with a warning.
